subject: Rabbit and tortoise moral story for kids
storyPrompt: A speedy rabbit mocks a calm tortoise and challenges him to a race, but steady effort and focus win the day.

script.title: The Rabbit and the Tortoise
script.synopsis: A speedy rabbit mocks a calm tortoise and challenges him to a race, but steady effort and focus win the day.
script.moral: Slow and steady wins the race.

sceneBeats.summary: Rabbit boasts about speed while Tortoise stays calm and polite.
The forest friends announce a race between Rabbit and Tortoise.
Rabbit sprints ahead, then rests proudly while Tortoise keeps moving step by step.
Rabbit wakes up too late and rushes, but Tortoise reaches the finish line first.
Rabbit admits his mistake and learns to respect patience and consistency.

script.narration: Rabbit laughed at Tortoise for being slow. But in the race, Rabbit stopped and slept while Tortoise kept walking. In the end, Tortoise won because he never gave up. Slow and steady wins the race.
